sessionStart.name: litestar-session-start
sessionStart.command: r="${CURSOR_PLUGIN_ROOT:-${PLUGIN_ROOT:-}}"; if [ -n "$r" ] && [ ! -f "${r%/}/hooks/session-start.sh" ]; then r=""; fi; if [ -z "$r" ] && [ -f ./hooks/session-start.sh ]; then r="."; fi; [ -n "$r" ] || exit 0; CURSOR_PLUGIN_ROOT="${r%/}" bash "${r%/}/hooks/session-start.sh"
sessionStart.description: Inject project-aware Litestar skill reminders into the Cursor session context.
